criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Presence and quality of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, chatbots, and visual search

criteria.name: User Reviews
criteria.description: Feedback from users regarding the app's performance and AI capabilities

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated to improve AI features and overall performance
